title: Build an Accessible Audio Controller
description: An accessible audio controller built with ARIA attributes. A Play button and a Mute button provide playback controls, while a range input for volume uses aria-labelledby pointing to two span elements — a label and a description — demonstrating how ARIA can associate multiple text nodes with a single control.
objectives: Use aria-labelledby to associate a label and description with an input
Reference multiple element IDs in a single aria-labelledby attribute
Use type='range' for a volume slider with min, max, and value
Add button elements with type='button' for custom controls

files.name: index.html
